name: Dark broken stone wall terrain for a ruined keep, 32x32 high top-down pixel art viewed from ~35 degrees, raised wall stones and collapsed block mass, muted #4A3F3F value, darker crevices, ancient fortress masonry, dark gritty palette → Dark debris stone floor variant with subtle rift crack hint, pixel art top-down view, dark warm charcoal-grey RGB(44,42,42) base with faint cold blue RGB(123,167,188) hairline rift fracture overlay, weathered ruined keep floor with magical seam, matte desaturated with sparse cyan thread accent, dark gritty serious mood
lower_description: Dark broken stone wall terrain for a ruined keep, 32x32 high top-down pixel art viewed from ~35 degrees, raised wall stones and collapsed block mass, muted #4A3F3F value, darker crevices, ancient fortress masonry, dark gritty palette
upper_description: Dark debris stone floor variant with subtle rift crack hint, pixel art top-down view, dark warm charcoal-grey RGB(44,42,42) base with faint cold blue RGB(123,167,188) hairline rift fracture overlay, weathered ruined keep floor with magical seam, matte desaturated with sparse cyan thread accent, dark gritty serious mood
transition_description: Cold blue cyan rift cracks splitting through ancient wall masonry, fractured stone with magical seam where rift overlay meets wall block surface, hairline cyan fracture pattern, dust accumulation in crevices, asymmetric organic boundary

terrain_prompts.lower: Dark broken stone wall terrain for a ruined keep, 32x32 high top-down pixel art viewed from ~35 degrees, raised wall stones and collapsed block mass, muted #4A3F3F value, darker crevices, ancient fortress masonry, dark gritty palette
terrain_prompts.upper: Dark debris stone floor variant with subtle rift crack hint, pixel art top-down view, dark warm charcoal-grey RGB(44,42,42) base with faint cold blue RGB(123,167,188) hairline rift fracture overlay, weathered ruined keep floor with magical seam, matte desaturated with sparse cyan thread accent, dark gritty serious mood
terrain_prompts.transition: Cold blue cyan rift cracks splitting through ancient wall masonry, fractured stone with magical seam where rift overlay meets wall block surface, hairline cyan fracture pattern, dust accumulation in crevices, asymmetric organic boundary

pattern_system.description: 4×4 patterns with wildcards for flexible tile matching

pattern_layout.description: 4×4 grid where center 2×2 matches tile corners, outer ring uses wildcards

example.row_1: Wildcard + NW corner + NE corner + Wildcard
example.row_2: Wildcard + SW corner + SE corner + Wildcard

usage.description: Sample 4×4 terrain around tile position, encode as pattern key, lookup in cache
